title: AutoMLG
description: A simple client-side mod that can automatically MLG for you.
body:
**A simple mod that can automatically MLG for you to save you from fall damage. You do not need to be holding the item in your hand for it to work, it only needs to be in your hotbar.**

---

### `/AutoMLG enable`
Enables AutoMLG

### `/AutoMLG disable`
Disables AutoMLG

### `/AutoMLG MLGHeight <float>`
Sets the minimum fall distance to automatically MLG from

### `/AutoMLG pickUpWater <true|false>`
Whether to pick up water after water bucket MLGs

### `/AutoMLG addMLG <item>`
Add an MLG item. AutoMLG will only MLG with items you have added (options: waterbucket, slime, cobweb, haybale)

### `/AutoMLG removeMLG <item>`
Remove an MLG item. AutoMLG will not MLG with this item unless added again

### `/AutoMLG help`
Sends this list of commands in chat
